strategy_description: EWMA mean/variance on adjacent-strike mid gaps (m_i - m_{i+1}); z-score vs pre-update EWMA; trade widest |z| edge: gap high sells higher strike / buys lower; gap low opposite. Size scales with z, inverse vega (BS at fixed 7d/365 T), inverse two-leg half-spread sum. No underlying hedge.

Same neighbor-gap MR core; iteration-1 sweep: higher Z_THRESHOLD (2.35), faster EWMA (0.03), smaller clips, trade every 3 ticks after warmup. Day-aware TTE: detect day boundary via timestamp rollback, TTE_days=8-day_idx per round3description mapping to CSV days 0–2; BS IV/delta/vega use that T. Post vertical, hedge VELVETFRUIT_EXTRACT with integer size ~round(net bundle delta).

Same neighbor-gap MR thesis as v1; parameter grid over {Z_THRESHOLD, TRADE_EVERY, BASE_SIZE, hedge_ratio} selected stricter entry Z_THRESHOLD=2.9 (tie-broken to simpler base_size=8). Keeps day-aware TTE from round3description mapping via timestamp rollback day_idx and BS IV/vega/delta with extract hedge.

Extends v2: same gap z1 entry (Z_G=2.9) and extract delta hedge. Adds spline-style local residual R_i=g_i-0.5(g_{i-1}+g_{i+1}) with its own EWMA z_R; for interior edges require |z_R|>=0.45 and sign(z_R)=sign(z1). Edges use v2 only. Four-strike half-spread sum cap MAX_SPREAD_SUM=100. Backtest total -908 (matches v2 on this tape; micro-sweep z_R in {0.35..0.55} x spread cap unchanged PnL).

Parent v2 (best PnL -908). Adds Black-Scholes theta (r=0, dC/dT per year) on both legs; size multiplier theta_scale = THETA_REF/(THETA_REF+0.5(|θh|+|θl|)), floored 0.25. Sweep: THETA_REF in {12,50,150} -> total -1248; {500+} -> -908 (neutral, same as v2). Shipped THETA_REF=500 to keep Greek in code without hurting PnL on this tape.

Parent v2; same mean-revert on neighbor mid gaps, Z_THRESHOLD=2.9, vega/spread sizing, TTE and delta hedge. Edge selection: among |z|>=threshold, maximize opportunity score |z|/(two_leg_half_spreads+eps) instead of max |z| — size-to-cost at selection time. Backtest total -908 (ties v2 on days 0-2; may differ which edge when scores tie).

Parent v5/v2 with same neighbor-gap z-score entry and spread-opportunity edge selection. Adds BS call gamma for both legs and clip factor gamma_scale=GAMMA_REF/(GAMMA_REF+|gamma_hi-gamma_lo|), floored 0.35. Sweep over GAMMA_REF in [0.0004..0.006] leaves total unchanged at -908; keep default 0.0012.
